languages.text: {n}Эоганн склоняется всем телом в глубоком поклоне.{/n} "Я понимаю и благодарю вас за снисходительный приговор, Вольный Торговец. Я буду ценить то время, что мы вместе провели на пути Познания. Быть может, когда-нибудь этот опыт поможет мне найти решение и рассказать о вас Нунциусу лично".

{n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн склоняется всем телом в глубоком поклоне.{/n} "Я понимаю и благодарю вас за снисходительный приговор, Вольный Торговец. Я буду ценить то время, что мы вместе провели на пути Познания. Быть может, когда-нибудь этот опыт поможет мне найти решение и рассказать о вас Нунциусу лично".

I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

{n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

{n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hace una reverencia de cuerpo entero.{/n} «Lo entiendo y agradezco su misericordia, Comerciante Independiente. Atesoraré el tiempo que hemos pasado juntos en la senda del conocimiento. Tal vez algún día esta experiencia me ayude a encontrar una solución y pueda hablarle de usted a Nuncius».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hace una reverencia de cuerpo entero.{/n} «Lo entiendo y agradezco su misericordia, Comerciante Independiente. Atesoraré el tiempo que hemos pasado juntos en la senda del conocimiento. Tal vez algún día esta experiencia me ayude a encontrar una solución y pueda hablarle de usted a Nuncius».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡俯下他庞大的身躯，深深鞠了一躬。{/n}“我明白。感谢您仁慈的决断，行商浪人。你我在求知之路上共度的时光，我会好好珍惜。或许某天，这段经历能助我找到解决之道，到那时，我也就能向努恩修斯讲讲您的事了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡俯下他庞大的身躯，深深鞠了一躬。{/n}“我明白。感谢您仁慈的决断，行商浪人。你我在求知之路上共度的时光，我会好好珍惜。或许某天，这段经历能助我找到解决之道，到那时，我也就能向努恩修斯讲讲您的事了。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'incline respectueusement de tout son corps.{/n} « Je comprends et vous remercie pour votre jugement magnanime, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je chérirai le temps que nous avons passé ensemble sur la voie de la connaissance. Un jour, cette expérience m'aidera peut-être à trouver une solution et je pourrai alors parler de vous à Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn s'incline respectueusement de tout son corps.{/n} « Je comprends et vous remercie pour votre jugement magnanime, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je chérirai le temps que nous avons passé ensemble sur la voie de la connaissance. Un jour, cette expérience m'aidera peut-être à trouver une solution et je pourrai alors parler de vous à Nuncius. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, tüm bedeniyle derin bir şekilde eğiliyor.{/n} "Anlıyorum. Merhametli kararınız için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir. Bilgi yolunda birlikte geçirdiğimiz zamanın değerini bileceğim. Belki bir gün bu deneyim sayesinde bir çözüm bulur ve Nuncius'a sizden bahsedebilirim."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, tüm bedeniyle derin bir şekilde eğiliyor.{/n} "Anlıyorum. Merhametli kararınız için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir. Bilgi yolunda birlikte geçirdiğimiz zamanın değerini bileceğim. Belki bir gün bu deneyim sayesinde bir çözüm bulur ve Nuncius'a sizden bahsedebilirim."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn macht eine tiefe Verbeugung.{/n} "Ich verstehe und danke Euch für Euer gnädiges Urteil, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde unsere gemeinsame Zeit auf dem Weg des Wissens für immer schätzen. Vielleicht hilft mir dieses Erlebnis eines Tages, eine Lösung zu finden, dann kann ich Nuncius von Euch erzählen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn macht eine tiefe Verbeugung.{/n} "Ich verstehe und danke Euch für Euer gnädiges Urteil, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde unsere gemeinsame Zeit auf dem Weg des Wissens für immer schätzen. Vielleicht hilft mir dieses Erlebnis eines Tages, eine Lösung zu finden, dann kann ich Nuncius von Euch erzählen."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは全身を曲げて深く頭を下げた。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダーよ、あなたの慈悲深い判断に感謝する。知識の道で共に過ごした時間を大切にします。いつか、この経験が解決の糸口となり、ヌンキウスにあなたのことを伝えられるかもしれません」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."
